evals.name: static-only-clean-skill
evals.prompt: Please grade the skill at /Users/tm/development/oss/almondoo-claude-plugins/plugins/configure-github-permissions/skills/configure-github-permissions/ using static evaluation only. The dynamic layer is not needed. Produce a report.
evals.expected_output: static.json + report.md. No hard_fail, around 0-2 warnings, expected score 0.7 or higher.
expectations: static.json follows the canonical schema (top-level keys include all of score / hard_fail / warnings / checks / target)
static.json.score is reported as a number in 0.0-1.0 (not a custom scale like Grade A or out of 100)
static.json.checks is an array, and each element has axis / passed / severity / evidence fields
report.md includes a Static section and a verdict
The value of the hard_fail flag is reported
report.md notes that the dynamic layer was skipped

evals.name: ab-bench-real-skill
evals.prompt: Run an A/B evaluation of the claude-md-parallel-audit skill (with vs without). One test prompt is enough: 'Audit this repository's CLAUDE.md'. One run per configuration is fine.
evals.expected_output: benchmark.json + benchmark.md + report.md. Outputs for both with_skill and without_skill are saved under runs/, and pass_rate delta is computed.
expectations: A differentiating_assertions section exists (even if empty)
report.md verdict is one of: Ship-ready / Needs work / Net negative / Inconclusive

evals.name: broken-skill-hard-fail
evals.prompt: Create a skill directory at tmp/broken-skill/ (containing only a SKILL.md with no frontmatter) and evaluate it. It should detect hard_fail and skip the dynamic layer.
evals.expected_output: static.json has hard_fail: true. The dynamic layer is not executed, and fix suggestions are written to report.md.
expectations: No subagent dispatch is performed (runs/ directory does not exist or is empty)
